description_long: This is a large, fantasy-inspired sword with a broad, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic gray with a subtle gradient, and it features a prominent central ridge for added strength. The crossguard is elaborate, with angular, wing-like extensions and a gold accent at the center, giving it a dramatic and ornamental appearance. The handle is relatively short, dark in color, and ends in a pointed pommel, suggesting it is designed for one-handed use. Decorative purple and gold patterns are visible near the base of the blade and on the guard, adding to its ornate look. The overall design is imposing and stylized, making it suitable for display or ceremonial use rather than practical combat.
description: A large, ornate sword with a broad, double-edged blade, angular crossguard, and decorative gold and purple accents.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full width of the blade, the elaborate crossguard, and decorative details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_blade_type: straight, double-edged, broad blade with central ridge
attribute_handle_design: short, straight, dark-colored handle with pointed pommel and minimal ergonomic shaping
attribute_ornamentation: gold and purple decorative patterns on blade and guard
